site.name: Aevum
site.description: The architecture of a long, high-quality life. Protocols, biomarkers and optimization technology analyzed with scientific rigor.

home.hero: The science of living longer and better
home.heroSub: Longevity protocols, biomarkers and human optimization technology analyzed with scientific evidence. No hype, no miracle promises.

article.affiliateDisclosure: This article contains affiliate links. If you purchase through them, we receive a commission at no extra cost to you. This allows us to maintain Aevum as an independent resource.

newsletter.title: Aevum Briefing
newsletter.description: Every week: one protocol, one evidence analysis and what matters in longevity. No noise. Straight to your inbox.
newsletter.premiumDesc: Complete protocols, curated stacks and in-depth biomarker analysis.

footer.about: Aevum is an independent precision longevity lab. We analyze protocols, technology and supplements with scientific rigor so you can make informed decisions about your healthspan.

protocols.title: Protocols & Science
protocols.description: Sleep, cortisol, peptides, NAD+, vagus nerve. Each protocol is a clinical question answered with evidence, dosing, risks and premium providers.

skin.title: Skin Longevity
skin.description: Cosmetic peptides, retinoids, exosomes. The science behind high-performance cosmetics, with real dermatological criteria.

mind.title: Mind & Cognition
mind.description: Friction maxxing, analog leisure, reading, cognitive longevity. Attention as a non-renewable resource.

tribe.title: Tribe & Connection
tribe.description: Third places, loneliness and mortality, longevity coaches, Aevum Salons. Social connection as a longevity variable.

rest.title: Rest & Recovery
rest.description: Longevity retreats, burnout retreats, restorative travel. Rest as an investment, not a luxury.

practitioners.title: Practitioners
practitioners.description: Curated directory of professionals: longevity doctors, coaches, nutritionists, dermatologists. Verified credentials and evidence-based approach.

wearables.title: Wearables & Tracking
wearables.description: Monitoring devices, smart rings and measurement systems to quantify your biology and make data-driven decisions.

supplements.title: Supplements & Longevity
supplements.description: NMN, NR, magnesium, creatine and NAD+ precursors. Real scientific evidence, no exaggerated claims.

beauty.title: Beauty & Premium Cosmetics
beauty.description: High-performance cosmetics from cellular biology. Augustinus Bader, La Prairie, evidence-backed ingredients.

journal.title: Journal
journal.description: Essays, interviews, paper reviews and profiles. The editorial voice of Aevum.

ingredients.title: Longevity Ingredients
ingredients.description: One compound, one article. Urolithin A, spermidine, Akkermansia, berberine, fisetin. The definitive guide to every longevity molecule: mechanism, evidence, dosing and where to buy.

hara.title: Hara
hara.description: K-Beauty, functional beverages and Asian healthspan traditions — examined through a longevity lens. Ingredients, protocols and products from East Asia, with real evidence.

k-beauty.title: K-Beauty
k-beauty.description: Korean skincare rituals, medical-grade ingredients and protocols for skin longevity. PDRN, exosomes, EGF and the science behind glass skin.

functional-drinks.title: Functional Drinks
functional-drinks.description: Matcha, kombucha, adaptogens, GABA drinks. Asian functional beverages analyzed with evidence.

asian-healthspan.title: Asian Healthspan
asian-healthspan.description: Asian blue zones, traditional medicine, beauty ingestibles and the GLP-1 × skincare crossover. Longevity from the East.
